calibration.calibration_note: With hazard_harm=0.02, avg episode ~182 steps (was ~18 with 0.5). Actual episode time higher.

items.title: arc_062 GAP-B behavioural falsifier (MECH-309 / ARC-062): rule-creator committed-class diversity on the CRF-GATE CALIBRATION AMEND (crf-availability-maintenance, ungated from GAP-A); ARM_OFF legacy-collapsed vs ARM_ON matured+maintained+gate-cleared differentiated crf_source. RECOVERY re-queue of V3-EXQ-654e.
items.note: RECOVERY re-queue of V3-EXQ-654e (science UNCHANGED). 654e was queued (ree-v3 488ec03), claimed+started on the hub ree-cloud-1 (2026-06-17T08:53:05Z) but CRASHED ~3s later on a TRANSIENT cross-checkout kwarg skew (TypeError: E3TrajectorySelector.select() got unexpected kwarg 'e2_forward_pe_per_candidate' -- DR-12 added the e3_selector param; ARC-063 added the unconditional agent.select_action call-site; the hub runner checkout briefly had the call-site WITHOUT the param). The runner caught the ERROR, moved 654e to 'completed', dropped it from the queue with NO manifest -> phantom coordinator-DB row (results empty); re-queuing under the SAME id will NOT run (runner skips completed ids). Skew RESOLVED: origin/main + hub runner checkout both carry the e3_selector param AND the agent call-site (verified 6/5 occurrences). 654f re-runs the identical experiment under a new id. SCIENCE (unchanged from 654e): GAP-B behavioural falsifier on the crf-availability-maintenance CRF-GATE CALIBRATION AMEND (3 no-op-default levers under mature_pool_dynamics; landed ree-v3 main 42895f6), UNGATED from GAP-A. 654d (confirmed failure_autopsy non_contributory) proved the GAP-A de-collapse was the WRONG lever (crf_frac_active stayed 0.0 even where consumed_summary cleared the 0.05 floor; the CRF conflict gate locks out 7-8 co-matching rules, theta(7)=1.65 >> maintenance_floor 0.45, INDEPENDENT of GAP-A). ARM_ON arms 0.7/3/True (crf_mature_context_match_threshold=0.7 + crf_tolerance_conflict_cap=3 + crf_maintenance_couple_to_theta=True); the 684a-validated ARM_STD_G2 GAP-A conversion constant RETAINED on both arms. PRIMARY DV = COMMITTED-CLASS entropy. THREE-branch NO-weakens routing: (a) C1 readiness met (crf_frac_active>=0.30 + propagation non-vacuous) AND C2 committed-class lift (>=2/3 seeds) -> PASS -> MECH-309/ARC-062 supports; (b) C1 met AND C2 fails -> shared selection-authority CONVERSION ceiling (GAP-A 569g/682) -> non_contributory + /implement-substrate, NOT a falsification; (c) C1 fails -> non_contributory/substrate_not_ready_requeue -> re-queue. P0 200 / P1 90 (frozen-encoder bias-head REINFORCE) / P2 60. Validator --strict --paths OK; dry-run smoke PASS (both arms end-to-end through P0/P1/P2, no TypeError, emit_outcome sentinel correct; correctly self-routed substrate_not_ready_requeue at dry scale by design). Do NOT flip substrate_queue ready (that is a LATER governance step on 654f PASS). Do NOT start the runner (cloud auto-claims). Concurrency: pathspec-committed with only this script + queue entry; post-commit dropped-file + jq grep check per CLAUDE.md before push.

items.title: MECH-436 drive-coupling retest on the SD-049-PHASE-2 kappa-scale + standing differential-depletion substrate (514r successor)
items.note: 514r-successor MECH-436 retest on the landed SD-049-PHASE-2 drive-coupling amend (kappa_scale=6.0 + WL-scoring-env partial restoration 0.3 + divergent decay). LOAD-BEARING PASS = natural drive-coupled delta mean(WL_drive-WL_nodrive) >= max(k*pstdev,0.15) on >=2/3 seeds -> MECH-436 substrate_ceiling->supports. NEW enriched-spread non-vacuity precondition (in-run drive_spread_max >= 0.10) + 514r overshoot/OFF/argmax-relevance readiness gates self-route substrate_not_ready_requeue, NEVER a false weakens. MECH-229 leg (a) untouched. Re-applied DB-authoritatively after a concurrent queue-conflict rebase.

items.title: Q-045 / MECH-313 / MECH-260 4-arm tonic-noise / exploration-floor ablation (both-OFF / 313-only / 260-only / both-ON) on the now-survival-competent scaffolded_sd054_onboarding substrate; ARC-062 gated-policy on all arms
items.note: The registered Q-045 four-arm ablation (both-OFF / MECH-313-only / MECH-260-only / both-ON), finally runnable: the survival-competent successor to the 603a-e Q-045 chain that ALL bottomed at substrate-readiness (effective N=1 from seed death, z_goal=0, MECH-260 FIFO non-operative -> Q-045 routed substrate_ceiling 2026-05-27). New number because the 603-series drifted entirely to the SD-059/MECH-358 bridge/harm lineage; same scientific question, substantially new (now survivable) substrate. The full Stage-0/0b/P0/Stage-H/P1 survival-competence config is ported VERBATIM from V3-EXQ-603q (PASS 2026-06-17T04:28:30Z) and held CONSTANT across all 4 arms (scaffolding, not under test): harm-pathway training+stabilization (603k+603q amend), SD-058/MECH-357 IA gate + driver, SD-059/MECH-358 escape bridge, PAG, fed harm stream, nursery + developmental window + 634c seeding calibration + SD-057 cue-recall. The ONLY cross-arm variables are use_noise_floor/noise_floor_alpha (MECH-313) and use_dacc/dacc_suppression_weight=0.5/memory=8 (MECH-260); ARC-062 use_gated_policy enabled on all arms (the Q-045 spec). After the curriculum a FROZEN-POLICY P2 (30 ep x 300 steps, FIFO warmup 30) measures selected-action-class entropy (primary diversity DV) + reef occupancy + z_goal + dACC FIFO diagnostics. claim_ids=[Q-045,MECH-313,MECH-260] -> evidence_direction_per_claim. FOUR pre-registered non-vacuity preconditions self-route substrate_not_ready_requeue / non_contributory, NEVER a false weakens: PRE_REACH (>=2/3 seeds per arm reach P2 with measured_steps>=100 -- the effective-N=1 killer), PRE_ZGOAL (z_goal_norm_peak>0.4 on >=2/3 P2 cells), PRE_MECH260 (dACC FIFO operative on >=2/3 seeds of EACH dACC arm -- guards the 603 call-path-bypass bug), PRE_NONDEGEN (entropy metric non-degenerate via _metrics.check_degeneracy). A genuine `weakens` (fail_no_diversity) is reachable ONLY when all preconditions hold. Evidence grid maps to Q-045's registered outcomes (mutually-load-bearing / 313-dominates / 260-dominates) + the R4 lit-pull DIRECTIONALLY-COUPLED 4th category (Tervo 2014, flags the 8-cell follow-on). experiment_purpose=evidence. Validator --strict OK; dry-run smoke PASS (full pipeline end-to-end, all 4 arms, z_goal forms 0.44-0.53; correctly self-routed substrate_not_ready_requeue at dry scale by design -- undertrained toy agent dies before the P2 FIFO warmup so measured_steps=0). Q-045 stays open/substrate_ceiling; MECH-313 candidate_substrate_landed; MECH-260 candidate -- no status change pending the run. Do NOT start the runner (cloud auto-claims).

items.title: SD-034 closure-control-plane de-commit authority retest on the BETA-ENGAGEMENT-amended substrate (use_closure_commit_beta_coupling): ARM_CLOSURE_ON vs OFF non-cap-pinned ON<OFF beta-latch-occupancy drop, beta now engaged via the closure->beta coupling. Supersedes V3-EXQ-460e.
items.note: commitment_closure:GAP-4 de-commit retest on the landed beta-engagement amend (mechanism a; ree-v3 main f4ceea4 use_closure_commit_beta_coupling). 460e self-routed substrate_not_ready_requeue on beta_engagement_not_met_both_arms (1/3 seeds); the coupling makes beta occupancy track the closure-plane commitment so the C2 non-cap-pinned ON<OFF latch-occupancy drop is readable (dry-run: beta_engaged_both=True, on_occ 3.50<off_occ 6.00, c1/c2/c3 PASS). claim_ids=[SD-034,MECH-260,MECH-261]; experiment_purpose=evidence. Four readiness gates (contact / trained-head / beta-engagement-both-arms / closure-trigger) self-route substrate_not_ready_requeue when unmet, NEVER a false weakens; sd034_n_closure_coupled_elevations is the coupling non-vacuity readout. SD-034/MECH-260/MECH-261 stay provisional/candidate + pending_retest_after_substrate; promotes nothing until a contributory PASS. Queued with V3-EXQ-468e.

items.title: SD-034/MECH-268/MECH-090 commitment-vs-contradiction de-commit-hold retest on the BETA-ENGAGEMENT-amended substrate (use_closure_commit_beta_coupling): commit-with-beta now reliable so the contradiction-release / non-cap-pinned committed-frac-post DV is exercisable. Supersedes V3-EXQ-468d.
items.note: MECH-090 commit-entry conjunction under the trained head, on the landed beta-engagement amend. 468d's commitment non-vacuity gate (total_beta_elevated>0 both arms) is the same commit-with-beta precondition 460e showed fails 2/3 seeds; the coupling resolves it (dry-run beta_elev=14 confirms beta engages). Dry-run self-routes substrate_not_ready_requeue on episodes_with_contradiction=0 at toy budget (the designed self-route; full budget fires contradictions). claim_ids=[SD-034,MECH-268,MECH-090]; experiment_purpose=diagnostic. Promotes nothing; pending_retest_after_substrate. Queued with V3-EXQ-460f.
